title: Newport Lighter Fluid | 133ml | 2-Pack with 6X Universal Flints | Compatible with Zippo Refillable Lighters | Fast Ignition | Clean Burning Fuel | Universal Lighter Fluid Refill
description: Keep your refillable lighters performing at their best with this Newport lighter fluid bundle. The package includes two 133ml cans of premium lighter fluid and a pack of universal flints, offering excellent value. This versatile lighter fluid ensures fast ignition and clean burning performance, making it ideal for all Zippo and similar refillable lighters. The fluid can also be utilised in home and art studio applications. Each can features a convenient dispensing nozzle for precise refilling without mess or waste. The included universal flints are compatible with standard lighter mechanisms, ensuring reliable sparks every time. The generous 133ml volume per can provides multiple refills, whilst the durable metal containers ensure safe storage. Experience consistent, reliable performance with this high-quality lighter fluid that delivers quick starts and complete combustion.
